_doc: AV Component Registry: Layer AV (Availability) canonical set (opened 2026-07-17). The offline canonical set ships as ONE unit (banner + queue + connectivity + session-timeout + device-fingerprint); adoption = all five present. Health (/health) = Layer A9 100%; loading states = Layer F FF1 100%; DR seeds = seeders/.

components.name: offline canonical set (banner/queue/connectivity/session-timeout/device-fingerprint)
components.satisfies: PWA offline resilience + session hygiene on worker tool pages
components.need: family minus chrome-less trio; per-page disposition during the wave may add exempts
components.exempt_reason: founder-only / poster / status surfaces: chrome-less by design (same basis as FCh1/2)
